prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-MINITAPE-PATCHES-BLK-AMZN-2PK-LH Product Type: ADHESIVE_TAPES Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Tenacious Tape Mini Patches with Peel-and-Stick Adhesive to Fix Holes and Tears in Winter Gear, Down Puffer Jackets, Sleeping Bags, Tents, and Rain Gear, Black, 2 Pack Description: Instantly fix rips and tears on down jackets on the go with Tenacious Tape Mini Patches. Apply them on puffy coats or sleeping bags to quickly stop feathers from leaking or use one to fix a ripped GORE-TEX jacket or torn tent.

The mini patches come in a lightweight and convenient pocket pack and includes six ready-to-use patches in black nylon. With no cutting required, simply peel and stick for quick, on-the-go repairs. Throw some Tenacious Tape Mini Patches in a backpack or pocket and never worry about ripped gear again. Search Terms: tenacious tape; gear aid; mini; patches; repair; rain gear; down; coat; puffy; kit; black; nylon; fix; clear; hole; tear; pants; backpack; gloves; rainwear; outerwear; peel and stick; fabric; air mattress; ski pants; easy to apply Features: - Repair holes and tears in down jackets, coats, rain gear, tents, and other outdoor gear with these easy to use, peel and stick patches; no sewing required - Use this ultra-strong adhesive tape that permanently bonds to nylon, polyester, GORE-TEX fabric, and vinyl (not for cotton, denim or natural fabrics) - Apply the six 1.5" x 2.5" patches on puffy coats, backpacks, ski pants, or gloves; sealed with a waterproof coating for full weather protection - Choose from all black nylon, all clear, or a combination of black and clear patches; nearly invisible repairs that won't peel off during a wash - Packaging may vary === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
